backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (vehicles, variants, colors, blog posts, testimonials, promotions, media assets, visitor stats, contact submissions, credit simulations, admin users, etc.) and including mixins for blob storage and authorization with access control state initialization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the media list loading functionality on the admin media manager page is implemented with high confidence, referencing MediaAssetGrid, useMediaAssets hook, and MediaManagerPage components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and layouts, describing their functionality such as authentication guards, admin CRUD operations, public pages, and React Query integrations.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with root div and module script loading main.tsx, titled 'Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with public routes (Beranda, Mobil Keluarga/Niaga, Promo, Testimoni, Blog, Kontak, Simulasi Kredit) and protected admin routes with AuthGuard, plus React Query and theme providers.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserD: Dialog component for creating and editing admin users with form fields for name, email, and principal ID (for new users only), using React Hook Form mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUserL: Table component displaying admin users with email, name, role badge, and action buttons for edit/delete, preventing deletion of the last admin user and showing loading skeletons during data fetch.
frontend/src/components/admin/BannerImag: A dialog component for selecting banner images from media assets, filtering for images with 'banner' in the filename and displaying them in a radio-group grid with preview thumbnails using blob URLs.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostDi: A form dialog for creating and editing blog posts with title, excerpt, and content fields, including delegation identity validation and token expiry checking before submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostLi: A table component displaying all blog posts with edit, delete, and publish/unpublish toggle actions, including confirmation dialogs for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaAsset: A grid component displaying all media assets with preview thumbnails (using blob URLs from canister data), copy ID functionality, and delete actions with delegation identity validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/MediaUploa: A drag-and-drop file upload component supporting images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) and PDFs with file validation, size limits, upload progress tracking, and delegation identity validation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PassengerV: Dialog component for creating and editing passenger vehicles with form fields for vehicle name, description, and base price. Uses React hooks for form state management and mutation hooks for create/update operations.
Table component displaying all passenger vehicles with edit, delete, and publish status toggle actions. Includes loading skeletons, empty state, and confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/components/admin/PromoDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing promotions with fields for title, description, start date, and end date. Handles date conversion to/from nanosecond timestamps for backend compatibility.
Table component displaying all promotions with period dates, active status toggle, edit and delete actions. Includes loading states, empty state message, and delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Dialog component for creating and editing testimonials with fields for customer name, content, and rating (1-5). Validates rating range and sets default approved status and timestamp for new testimonials.
Table component displaying all testimonials with customer name, content preview, star rating visualization, and edit/delete action buttons. Includes loading skeletons and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/admin/TopPagesCh: Displays a horizontal bar chart of the top 10 most visited pages using Recharts, with loading and empty states. Converts bigint page view data to chart format, truncates long URLs for display, and shows full URLs in tooltips.
frontend/src/components/admin/VisitorTre: Renders a line chart showing visitor trends over the last 30 days using Recharts. Converts bigint timestamp data to formatted dates and displays visitor counts with loading and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that validates Internet Identity delegation, checks for anonymous principals, and redirects to login if identity is missing or expired, showing a loading spinner during initialization.
frontend/src/components/public/ArtikelTe: Displays a list of 5 hardcoded recent articles with icons and navigation to individual blog post pages. Each article is a clickable button that navigates to the blog detail route.
frontend/src/components/public/BottomCTA: Fixed bottom navigation bar with four action buttons (Call, WhatsApp, Simulasi, Menu) and a dropdown menu for site navigation. Includes click-outside detection to close the menu.
frontend/src/components/public/Commercia: Provides a button-based selector for commercial vehicle variants, managing selection state and notifying parent component of changes. Automatically selects the first variant on mount.
frontend/src/components/public/CTABanner: Displays a CTA banner image loaded from media assets or falls back to a static generated image. Creates blob URLs from canister storage data and handles loading states with skeleton.
frontend/src/components/public/Footer.ts: Site footer with company info, contact details, social media links, and real-time visitor statistics that auto-refresh every 15 seconds. Displays formatted visitor counts with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/public/HeroSecti: Dynamic hero banner that displays different titles, icons, backgrounds, and subtexts based on the current pathname. Handles special styling for Mobil Niaga pages with yellow background and black text.
frontend/src/components/public/Highlight: Carousel component displaying up to 8 family vehicles from the catalog using VehicleCard components. Fetches data via useGetAllVehicleCatalogs hook and shows loading state.
Displays a carousel of up to 8 commercial vehicles ('Mobil Niaga') fetched from vehicle catalogs, using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/components/public/MainBanne: Renders the main banner image, loading it from media assets or falling back to a static placeholder, with blob URL management.
frontend/src/components/public/Navbar.ts: Sticky navigation bar with logo, desktop menu, and mobile hamburger menu for site navigation including home, vehicle categories, promo, testimonials, blog, and contact.
frontend/src/components/public/ProductIn: Provides like and share buttons for a vehicle product, tracking counts and triggering native share API when available.
frontend/src/components/public/ProdukUng: Displays a grid of up to 4 featured vehicles ('Produk Unggulan') from the vehicle catalog.
frontend/src/components/public/SearchPro: Search input component that redirects to the family vehicles page with a search query parameter.
frontend/src/components/public/SpecialFe: Static section showcasing three key features: flexible installments, low down payment, and negotiable pricing with icons.
frontend/src/components/public/TentangKa: Static 'About Us' section describing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang dealership and its services.
frontend/src/components/public/VariantCo: Interactive selector for vehicle variants and colors with button groups, notifying parent component of selection changes.
frontend/src/components/public/VehicleCa: Card component displaying vehicle image, name, starting price, and detail link with formatted Indonesian currency.
frontend/src/constants/translations.ts: Centralized Indonesian language labels, validation messages, and user feedback messages for the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin dashboard statistics; currently returns default zero values as backend methods are missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUsers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for managing admin users (CRUD operations) with authentication and network error handling; currently returns stubs as backend methods are not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlogPosts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for blog post management (fetch, create, update, delete) with error classification and toast notifications; backend methods are stubbed and not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCommercialVehicles: Provides React Query hooks for commercial vehicle category CRUD operations; all backend methods are missing and return empty arrays or stubs.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactForm.ts: Provides a mutation hook for submitting contact form data; backend method is not implemented and logs a warning.
frontend/src/hooks/useContacts.ts: Provides a query hook to fetch all contact submissions; backend method is missing and returns an empty array.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreditSimulationFo: Provides a mutation hook for submitting credit simulation data; backend method is not implemented and logs a warning.
Provides a query hook to fetch all credit simulations; backend method is missing and returns an empty array.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication context and provider using @dfinity/auth-client, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validity with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useMediaAssets.ts: Provides React Query hooks for media asset management (fetch all, fetch by ID, create, update, delete) with comprehensive error handling for auth, network, and canister-stopped errors; includes retry logic and caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductInteraction: Provides React Query hooks for product like/share interactions (counts and mutations); all backend methods are stubbed and not implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/usePromotions.ts: React Query hooks for managing promotions (create, update, delete, get all) with authentication and network error handling. Currently stubbed with empty arrays and dummy IDs until backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePublicData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching public vehicle catalog data. Returns empty arrays/null as backend methods are not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hook for fetching website settings. Returns null as backend implementation is missing.
frontend/src/hooks/useTestimonials.ts: React Query hooks for testimonial CRUD operations with authentication and network error handling. Currently stubbed with empty arrays and dummy IDs pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVehicles.ts: React Query hooks for vehicle CRUD operations (create, update, delete, get all/single) with enhanced error classification for auth and network issues. Currently stubbed until backend implements the methods.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorStats.ts: React Query hooks for fetching visitor statistics, trends, and page views. Only getVisitorStats is enabled; trend and page view queries are disabled pending backend implementation.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisitorTracking.ts: Deprecated React hook for visitor tracking that is now handled by PublicLayout. Kept for backward compatibility but performs no operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebsiteSettings.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and updating website settings with authentication and network error handling. Currently stubbed until backend implements the methods.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including sidebar, charts, and semantic UI tokens.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin layout component with collapsible sidebar navigation, responsive mobile menu, and logout functionality. Includes menu items for dashboard, vehicles, promo, testimonials, blog, media, leads, statistics, settings, and admin users.
frontend/src/layouts/PublicLayout.tsx: Public-facing layout wrapper that includes Navbar, conditional HeroSection, Footer, and BottomCTABar. Implements visitor tracking on page navigation using session IDs, device detection, and browser fingerprinting.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
Admin user management page with list view, add/edit dialog, and delete functionality using Principal-based authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogPage.tsx: Blog post management page with list view and add/edit dialog, invalidating React Query cache on successful operations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommercialVehic: Placeholder page for commercial vehicles management that currently redirects users to the family vehicles section.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CreditSimulatio: Displays a sortable table of credit simulation submissions from visitors, showing vehicle ID, amount, tenor, and timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DashboardPage.t: Admin dashboard displaying statistics cards for passenger vehicles, commercial vehicles, blog posts, leads, media assets, and total visitors.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LeadsPage.tsx: Displays a sortable table of contact form submissions with name, email, message, and timestamp columns.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaManagerPag: Media management page with upload zone and asset grid, invalidating React Query cache after successful uploads.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PassengerVehicl: Admin page for managing passenger vehicles (Mobil Keluarga) with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PromosPage.tsx: Admin page for managing promotions with add/edit functionality via dialog and list display.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsPag: Admin page for managing testimonials with add/edit/delete functionality, including a confirmation dialog for deletions.
frontend/src/pages/admin/VisitorStatsPag: Admin dashboard displaying visitor statistics with auto-refresh (15s), showing metrics like total visitors, daily/weekly/monthly counts, online users, and charts for trends and top pages.
frontend/src/pages/admin/WebsiteSettings: Admin page for configuring website settings including site name, contact info, social media URLs, operational hours, and banner images with image picker dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication with loading states, error handling, and automatic redirect to admin dashboard on successful login.
frontend/src/pages/public/BerandaPage.ts: Public homepage composing multiple sections: main banner, vehicle highlights, CTA banner, about us, special features, product search, featured products, and latest articles.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogDetailPage: Placeholder page for blog article details, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/BlogListPage.t: Placeholder page for blog listing, currently showing 'under development' message.
frontend/src/pages/public/KontakPage.tsx: Public contact page with a form for customer inquiries including personal info, vehicle interest, down payment, tenor, and message fields.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaD: Public detail page for passenger vehicles showing vehicle info, price, variant/color selector, product interactions, and tabbed specs/features sections.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilKeluargaP: Public listing page displaying up to 8 published passenger vehicles in a grid layout using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaCate: Displays a grid of commercial vehicles filtered by category slug from URL params, showing up to 8 published vehicles using VehicleCard components.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaDeta: Shows detailed vehicle information including images, variants, pricing, specifications, and features with tabs; includes product interactions and action buttons for contacting sales and credit simulation.
frontend/src/pages/public/MobilNiagaPage: Landing page displaying three commercial vehicle categories (Light Duty, Medium Duty, Tractor Head) as clickable cards that navigate to category-specific pages.
frontend/src/pages/public/PromoPage.tsx: Placeholder page showing a development message for promotions section.
frontend/src/pages/public/SimulasiKredit: Credit simulation form that calculates estimated monthly installments based on vehicle selection, down payment, and tenor; submits simulation requests to backend.
Placeholder page showing a development message for testimonials section.
frontend/src/types/local.ts: TypeScript type definitions for all frontend data structures including Vehicle, Variant, Color, VehicleImage, Specification, Feature, Promotion, Testimonial, BlogPost, MediaAsset, WebsiteSettings, AdminUser, ContactSubmission, CreditSimulation, VisitorStats, and CommercialVehicleCategory.
frontend/src/utils/blobUrl.ts: Utility functions for converting MediaAsset Uint8Array blob data from canister storage into browser-displayable blob URLs and determining MIME types for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/utils/creditCalculation.ts: Calculates monthly loan installment amounts using an 8% annual interest rate based on vehicle price, down payment, and tenor period.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting URL parameters from query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Provides validation functions for forms (email, phone, URL, numeric, length) and delegation identity validation with detailed error messages for authentication states including expiration checks.
frontend/src/utils/visitorTracking.ts: Implements visitor tracking utilities including session ID generation/retrieval, device/browser detection, bot detection, and admin route checking for analytics purposes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking a fix request to modify getMediaAssets backend function to allow authenticated user access while maintaining admin-only authorization for deleteMediaAsset.
